allow: Bash(psql -U sandrakarenrq -d casaverde -c "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name ILIKE '%chica%';")
Bash(psql -U sandrakarenrq -d casaverde -c "SELECT table_name, column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND column_name ILIKE '%chica%';")
